title: Purely Tender Italian Chicken Pasta
description: A cultured and tender Italian dish featuring sesame butter and coconut cream, with an ayurvedic tamasic friendly twist
instructions: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil and cook the pasta according to the package instructions
In a large skillet, heat the olive oil over medium heat and add the garlic, cooking for 1 minute
Add the chicken breast to the skillet and cook until browned on both sides and cooked through
In a small bowl, whisk together the sesame butter and coconut cream
Add the sesame butter and coconut cream mixture to the skillet with the chicken and stir to combine
Stir in the chopped basil and season with salt and black pepper
Drain the cooked pasta and add it to the skillet, tossing to combine with the chicken and sauce
Serve the pasta hot, garnished with additional basil if desired
